allow: PowerShell($sha = "07e0c62406e6cdb38e85d32b7a16320a980240b5"; $checks = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/marigold-ui/marigold/commits/$sha/check-runs?per_page=100" -Headers @{ "Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json" }; $checks.check_runs | Where-Object { $_.conclusion -ne "success" -and $_.conclusion -ne "skipped" -and $_.conclusion -ne "neutral" } | Select-Object name, status, conclusion, html_url | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/marigold-ui/marigold/actions/runs/24984375547/jobs?per_page=50" -Headers @{ "Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json" }; $jobs.jobs | Select-Object name, conclusion, status, run_attempt | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($logUrl = "https://api.github.com/repos/marigold-ui/marigold/actions/jobs/73183774491/logs"; try { $logs = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $logUrl -Headers @{ "Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json" } -ErrorAction Stop; $logs.Content | Out-File -FilePath "C:\\Users\\osama\\Desktop\\marigold\\.claude\\worktrees\\test-log.txt" -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "Saved log, size: $\($logs.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(ComboBox\): make Sections story test deterministic *)
